summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Ranjana Yoga Studio website. All 6 pages functional with excellent navigation, mobile responsiveness, and user interactions working perfectly.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section and parallax effect
Sticky navigation bar with all links (Home, About, Services, Schedule, Gallery, Contact)
Navigation links work - all 6 pages load correctly
Hero CTA buttons ('Explore Classes', 'Book a Free Trial') present and functional
Homepage sections: Stats (200+, 10+, Small), Services Overview, Weight Loss, Why Us, Testimonials, CTA Banner, Gallery Strip
About page loads with Our Story and Instructor sections
Services page loads with 5 service detail sections (Yoga, Weight Loss, Ayurveda, Acupressure, Marma)
Schedule page loads with weekly timetable
Gallery page loads with masonry grid and lightbox functionality
Contact page loads with contact info and enquiry form
Contact form submission shows success message
Mobile responsive: hamburger menu works perfectly
Footer displays on all pages with Quick Links, Contact info, Social icons
